title: Project Metadata, Resources, PyInstaller, and Platform Builds · Behavior Case: Platform Native Build
summary: A one-file artifact is copied across operating systems, Tcl/Tk data is assumed present, assets depend on the working directory, and only the build machine launches it. Predict the model, event, graph, solver, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the platform native build increment in platform-native signed-off release artifact matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggi…
objectives: Produce and test separate artifacts on each supported operating system and architecture with recorded toolchains.
Inspect PyInstaller analysis, tkinter hooks, Tcl/Tk libraries and data, hidden imports, warnings, and artifact contents.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-worked-maze-packaging-platforms-5
# Competency: maze-worked-maze-packaging-platforms-5.
# Case 9036: a low-vision player session.
# Operating constraint: the prior good state must survive failure.
# Changed case: switch the solver or generator and restate each guarantee.
def worked_maze_packaging_platforms_5(target_platforms: int = 3, native_builds: int = 3, clean_launches: int = 3, missing_tk_assets: int = 0, artifact_digests: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "gridworked5",
        "topology9036",
        "search5dekrow",
        "eventworked59036",
        "access9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or native_builds < 0:
        return False, native_builds, "platform-matrix"
    if native_builds != target_platforms or clean_launches != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_launches, "clean-install-gap"
    if missing_tk_assets > 0:
        return False, missing_tk_assets, "tk-resource-gap"
    if artifact_digests != target_platforms:
        return False, artifact_digests, "artifact-identity"
    assert clean_launches == target_platforms
    return True, clean_launches, "platform-native-release"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Produce and test separate artifacts on each supported operating system and architecture with recorded toolchains.
